ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the project */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator of the project */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the project */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal for the project */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Amount pledged towards the project */,
  "backers" INTEGER /* Number of backers for the project */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  "funding_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the funding goal achieved */,
  "funding_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the funding period */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_url" TEXT /* URL of the project page */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's Facebook page */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's Twitter page */,
  "instagram_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's Instagram page */,
  "project_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the main project video */,
  "project_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the main project image */,
  "project_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and filtering */,
  "project_tags" TEXT /* Tags for additional categorization */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the project is featured */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the project has received */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the project has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the subcategory image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "creator_bio" TEXT /* Bio of the creator */,
  "creator_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's profile image */,
  "creator_website" TEXT /* URL of the creator's website */,
  "creator_facebook_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's Facebook page */,
  "creator_twitter_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's Twitter page */,
  "creator_instagram_url" TEXT /* URL of the creator's Instagram page */,
  "creator_email_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the creator's email is verified */,
  "creator_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the creator */,
  "creator_phone_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the creator's phone is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "location_country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the media belongs to */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media */,
  "media_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the media */,
  "media_order" INTEGER /* Order of the media in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_media_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "backer_name" TEXT /* Name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "pledged_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "backer_bio" TEXT /* Bio of the backer */,
  "backer_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's profile image */,
  "backer_website" TEXT /* URL of the backer's website */,
  "backer_facebook_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's Facebook page */,
  "backer_twitter_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's Twitter page */,
  "backer_instagram_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's Instagram page */,
  "backer_email_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the backer's email is verified */,
  "backer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the backer */,
  "backer_phone_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the backer's phone is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the reward belongs to */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Pledge amount required to receive the reward */,
  "reward_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward available */,
  "reward_ships_to" TEXT /* Countries where the reward ships to */,
  "reward_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the reward */,
  "reward_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the reward image */,
  "reward_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for search and filtering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backer who made the pledge */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the pledge belongs to */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reward the backer selected */,
  "pledge_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "reward_shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the update belongs to */,
  "update_title" TEXT /* Title of the update */,
  "update_content" TEXT /* Content of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "update_status" TEXT /* Status of the update */,
  "update_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the update image */,
  "update_video_url" TEXT /* URL of the update video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the update the comment belongs to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backer who made the comment */,
  "comment_content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_update_id FOREIGN KEY ("update_id") REFERENCES updates ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the message belongs to */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator who sent the message */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the backer who received the message */,
  "message_content" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message_status" TEXT /* Status of the message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id")
)
